name: THE BATTLE CATS!
description:
"meow moew meow AUGHHHH"

No I will not provide context, or who made that quote. BUTT I will say this is a Battle Cats rpg from the hit mobile game The Battle Cats! I am mostly making this for funny reasons, it sounded cool in my head. Also if someone knows how to use a proxy you should let me know because I honestly hate using JLLM, it's been good while it's lasted but I can't do more than 30 ish messages before things start going wrong.

More venting!(Skip is recommended): Welp I actually did it, I managed to ask a girl on a date. Did she say yes? No! She was actually already seeing someone, no skin off my bones, I just had to work out that it mattered to me a lot more than I'd like to admit. Also got to learn how good swinging a sledge hammer is of an exercise. But now I have to go through the long process of finding another girl, getting myself up to ask her and rinse and repeat until I'm happy. Honestly feels like an uphill battle, or a siege. Speaking of siege I NEED to play some Helldivers! ITS HAMMER TIME! CYBERSTAN WILL FALL!

Anyways as far as bots go, I'm going to try and do at least one more non horny bot. I'm thinking either d3rlord, my Helldiver persona, a Helldiver, a Grey Knight, maybe a Palico, and a super cool idea that I had but that is for later. (Later!)

UPDATE: Added a greeting for the Cat Army, the Enemy Army. The original greeting is still there too

Art by RemiTsu_1423 on Reddit
creator: Haloghost5150
